ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tlds" (
  "tld_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TLD */,
  "tld_name" TEXT /* Name of the TLD (e.g., com, xyz, info) */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the TLD in the dataset */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the TLD is popular */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry where the TLD is commonly used */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the TLD was first registered */,
  "total_registrations" INTEGER /* Total number of domain registrations for the TLD */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the TLD over a specified period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the TLD (e.g., Active, Deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tld_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tld_ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank */,
  "tld_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TLD being ranked */,
  "rank_name" TEXT /* Name of the rank (e.g., TLD.1, TLD.2) */,
  "rank_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the TLD in the rank */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the rank is applicable */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry where the rank is applicable */,
  "rank_date" TEXT /* Date when the rank was determined */,
  "rank_type" TEXT /* Type of rank (e.g., Global, Regional, Industry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tld_ranks_tld_id FOREIGN KEY ("tld_id") REFERENCES tlds ("tld_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was uploaded */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the uploaded data file */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the uploaded data file in MB */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the data */,
  "upload_status" TEXT /* Status of the upload (e.g., Success, Failed) */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of data validation (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "cleansed_data_file" TEXT /* File path of the cleansed data file */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data (e.g., v1.0, v2.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id")
)
